entities.name: FINGER MILLET
entities.description: A variety of millet evaluated for its nutritional content, specifically calcium and amino acids

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A variety of millet evaluated for its nutritional content, specifically iron and zinc

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume evaluated for its protein and essential amino acid content

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume evaluated for its protein and essential amino acid content

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A cereal mentioned as polished rice, which is less nutritionally dense than millet-legume blends

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A cereal mentioned as refined wheat flour, which is less nutritionally dense than millet-legume blends

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal mentioned as less nutritionally dense than millet-legume blends

entities.name: PROTEIN
entities.description: A macronutrient found in millets and legumes, essential for human nutrition

entities.name: PROTEIN DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: The measure of how well proteins are absorbed by the body

entities.name: AMINO ACID PROFILE
entities.description: The specific composition of amino acids in a food source

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENTS
entities.description: Essential minerals including iron, zinc, and calcium

entities.name: ESSENTIAL AMINO ACIDS
entities.description: Amino acids that cannot be synthesized by the body and must be obtained from diet

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: An essential micronutrient (Fe) found in pearl millet

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: An essential micronutrient (Zn) found in pearl millet

entities.name: CALCIUM
entities.description: An essential micronutrient (Ca) found in finger millet

entities.name: METHIONINE
entities.description: An essential amino acid found in millets but lacking in pigeonpea and chickpea

entities.name: CYSTEINE
entities.description: An amino acid found in millets but lacking in pigeonpea and chickpea

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A condition resulting from deficiencies in dietary protein and micronutrients

entities.name: HUMAN DIETARY NUTRITION
entities.description: The overall nutritional quality of food consumed by humans

entities.name: MILLET-LEGUME BLENDS
entities.description: The combination of millets and legumes to provide balanced amino acids and micronutrients
